text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well! I'd say today's results were quite pleasing,
wouldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's true I didn't quite reach my goal. I need
to learn from this as I prepare for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work even harder to show everyone
the wonders of feng shui! ☆
choice_data_list: Let's work on winning the next one!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work even harder to show everyone
the wonders of feng shui! ☆
choice_data_list: Let's work on winning the next one!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but you know, this is the fruit of your labor
too!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the training program you put together,
I've gotten stronger. I've even been able to make
use of feng shui in my races!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, I'm going to do everything I
can to bring home even better results.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Right. The more victories I can secure, the more
attention I'll receive. I'll show everyone how
incredible feng shui is!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
A happy future for everyone is waiting just
around the corner!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So what are we waiting for? Tell me about our
training program! I'm going to give it my all! ☆
